hero.title: Garden Coffee - Where Nature Meets Flavor
hero.desc: Enjoy a cool, green atmosphere and watch the Koi fish swim beside your cup of bold coffee. A peaceful haven in the heart of the city.

items.title: Green Space
items.desc: Over 100 species of tropical plants providing an absolutely fresh and cool atmosphere.

items.title: Japanese Koi Pond
items.desc: High-quality Koi fish from Japan, bringing a sense of tranquility and good fortune.

items.title: Roasted Coffee
items.desc: Carefully selected highland beans, purely roasted to deliver a rich, bold flavor.

menuSection.placeholder: For the full menu, please see at the counter. We always update new seasonal items.

items.name: Garden Egg Coffee
items.desc: Silky egg cream foam blended with rich Robusta espresso.

items.name: Tropical Fruit Tea
items.desc: Cold-brewed jasmine tea combined with 5 types of seasonal fresh fruit.

items.name: Coconut Milk Coffee
items.desc: The rich aroma of fresh coconut cream and traditional drip coffee.

items.name: Matcha Koi Garden
items.desc: Premium Japanese green tea powder combined with full-cream fresh milk.

gallery.sectionDesc: The perfect combination of classic wooden architecture, winding Koi pond and lush greenery.

testimonials.sectionSubtitle: Authentic experiences from coffee and nature lovers.

items.name: Ms. Minh Anh
items.text: The atmosphere here is absolutely wonderful. I can sit for hours just watching the Koi fish swim. The egg coffee is rich and exactly to my taste.

items.name: Mr. Hoàng Nam
items.text: Thank you for creating such a wonderful relaxing space. The staff are very professional and attentive. This is the ideal weekend gathering spot for my family.

items.name: Lê Quốc Khánh
items.text: The Koi pond is well cared for, with large fish and beautiful colors. The fruit tea here is refreshing and not too sweet. A 10/10 spot for nature lovers.

contact.address: 123 Lakeside Road, Thao Dien Ward, District 2, Ho Chi Minh City

footer.desc: Creating green spaces, nurturing the soul and savoring the most refined flavors from nature.
